name: WebTools
description: Tools for searching the internet, browsing web pages, and downloading files from URLs.

capabilities.name: web_search
capabilities.description: Search the internet for information using DuckDuckGo. Use this to find current events, documentation, or facts.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5).

capabilities.name: visit_page
capabilities.description: Visit a web page and extract its text content. Use this to read documentation, news articles, or other web content found via search.

url.description: The URL of the page to visit.

capabilities.name: download_file
capabilities.description: Download a file from a URL and save it to a specified local path. Supports images and arbitrary binary/text files.

url.description: The file URL to download. Supports http/https.

target_path.description: Target local path to save the file. Can be a full file path, or a directory path (existing dir or ending with '/').

filename.description: Optional custom filename. Used when target_path is a directory or when you want to override inferred filename.

max_bytes.description: Maximum allowed file size in bytes. Download aborts when exceeded. Default: 20971520 (20 MB).
